_comment: v2.1: Day-1 #1 Safe Auto-Run. Calls matching any rule below are flagged as safe_fast_path so step340 (sLLM judge) skips its LLM round-trip. The firewall pipeline still runs every other gate (step310 dangerous regex, step311 donor rules, step320 blast, step335 cost) so a safe-listed call is NOT exempt from real BLOCKs — only from the LLM judge. This produces the 'less prompts, better prompts' UX where common safe operations clear in <1 ms.

Read.description: Reading any file is non-mutating; sensitive_paths.json still gates secret paths.

_notes: All bash_subcommands match by prefix on the canonical command string after step312 normalization.
Quoted shell metachars (|, >, ;) and redirection are NOT in this list — those revert to full pipeline.
Adding entries here only loosens latency, never loosens enforcement: step310 destructive regex still runs.
